items.title: Joe Mazzulla on his message to Celtics before this season while Tatum rehabbed his Achilles:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Joe Mazzulla on his message to Celtics before this season while Tatum rehabbed his Achilles:

"There was a true level of trust there...We have a responsibility to go after winning...Our staff...They came in with a game plan that matched the personality and the strengths of the roster that we had."

items.title: Payton Pritchard & Jayson Tatum last season:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Payton Pritchard & Jayson Tatum last season:

46.1 points per game
123.2 offensive rating
104.7 defensive rating
18.5 net rating
+7.3

It's a pairing that puts defenses in predicaments and helps the Celtics maximize Tatum's best attributes on offense.
